script_text: Some words show up in almost every book you read.
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing.

script_text: Words like the, I, do, is, and you.
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing.

script_text: We call them sight words. Let us learn them!
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing.

script_text: Here are some important sight words. Let us read them together!
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing.

script_text: The. You see this word in almost every book.
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing.

script_text: I. That is what you call yourself.
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing.

script_text: Do. Like in, I do it!
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing.

script_text: Is. Like in, he is here.
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing.
Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing.

script_text: Those are five sight words you will see everywhere. Nice work!
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing.
